materials.material_name: Fe phase nanosphere/conical CNT bundle nanostructures

human_recipe.target_compound: Fe phase nanosphere/conical CNT bundle nanostructures

starting_materials.name: vertically aligned carbon nanotubes intercalated with the ferromagnetic (Fe phase) nanoparticles

steps.description: The FSL irradiation was performed in ambient atmosphere with laser scanning microscope (Zeiss LSM 510 NLO based on Zeiss Aviovert 200 M inverted research microscope).

materials.name: vertically aligned carbon nanotubes intercalated with the ferromagnetic (Fe phase) nanoparticles

equipment.name: laser scanning microscope
equipment.settings: Ti Sapphire laser; 100 fs pulses; 790 nm; 82 MHz repetition rate; 15 nJ pulse energy; 1.2 micrometer focus;

human_recipe.notes: The energy of a single pulse was 15 nJ. The laser beam was then focused by Zeiss Plan-Neofluar 40x/0.75 objective and formed a spot with 1.2 μm in diameter on the sample surface. The beam was attenuated with an acoustic-optical filter to the energy level of 6.25nJ per pulse at the focal plane of the microscope objective. The investigated samples were placed onto the stage of the microscope without cover glass.
